message: Temperature-sensitive/pharma cargo should not receive high confidence if airport cold-chain capability is unknown.

required_airport_fields: perishable_handling; frozen_storage or temperature_controlled_storage when relevant
message: Perishable cargo needs airport handling and storage capability matched to commodity and temperature.
Live animal cargo requires airport/handler animal handling capability and carrier acceptance.
Heavy/outsized cargo needs airport loading equipment, ULD/main-deck capability, and piece fit checks.
Valuable/vulnerable cargo needs secure storage or controlled handover; no VAL means block or reroute.
Dangerous goods cargo requires airport/handler DG acceptance and storage capability.
